data.full_response:
Investigation complete. Created GitHub issue #3: https://github.com/usehiveloop/hiveloop/issues/3

**Root cause:** TypeScript build failure in `apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx` - the `search` state variable was initialized as `useState(123)` (number) instead of `useState("")` (string), causing the `.trim()` call on line 27 to fail compilation.

**Fix:** Change line 18 from `useState(123)` to `useState("")`.

arguments.content: hiveloop.com project (project_id: 55776e03-e6c2-4a9b-828b-4e759495aa70) has production environment (environment_id: 3c177170-0fb2-4dcb-a034-12676bb242c6) with services: web.hiveloop.com (service_id: b6c22e03-d8f6-4966-b3d7-c6540e864f41), api.postgres.hiveloop.com (service_id: f8c26c6c-399d-48f1-9b49-f411df99e508), drive.hiveloop.com bucket (bucket_id: d4edbc26-7385-4536-8115-14415508508c). Workspace ID: 71ad85f8-ff26-4f3b-938a-adc10ae2655f.
arguments.context: Infrastructure topology discovered during deployment failure investigation

arguments.content: Incident 2026-04-16: web.hiveloop.com deployment failed (deployment_id: 9bea0d73-4372-4680-961a-b96684859ef8, commit: 62e88369c333090dc60c957750f85e21d2ba3bf3). Root cause: TypeScript error in apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx line 18 - search state initialized as number (123) instead of string, causing .trim() call on line 27 to fail. Fix: change useState(123) to useState(""). GitHub issue: #3 (https://github.com/usehiveloop/hiveloop/issues/3).
arguments.context: Deployment failure incident for web.hiveloop.com production

data.result: "{\"output\":\"{\\n  \\\"number\\\": 3,\\n  \\\"html_url\\\": \\\"https://github.com/usehiveloop/hiveloop/issues/3\\\",\\n  \\\"title\\\": \\\"[Incident] web.hiveloop.com: TypeScript build failure - search state initialized as number\\\"\\n}\\n\",\"exit_code\":0,\"timed_out\":false}"

arguments.command:
curl -s -X POST "https://api.github.com/repos/hiveloop/hiveloop/issues" \
  -H "Authorization: token ghs_REDACTED" \
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "title": "[Incident] web.hiveloop.com: TypeScript build failure - search state initialized as number",
    "body": "## Summary

**Service:** web.hiveloop.com
**Environment:** production
**Status:** FAILED
**Detected:** 2026-04-16T16:58:37Z

## Root Cause

TypeScript error in `apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx` at line 18: the `search` state variable is initialized as a number (`123`) instead of a string, but the code at line 27 calls `.trim()` on it, which is a string method.

**File:** `apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx`
**Lines:** 18, 27

```tsx
// Line 18 - incorrect initialization
const [search, setSearch] = useState(123)

// Line 27 - calls .trim() on number, causing TypeScript error
if (!search.trim()) return agents
```

The commit message from the previous failed deployment (6dd0957a) mentioned: "Also includes intentional type error in agents page to trigger dispatch webhook." This error appears to be a leftover from that testing and was not removed before merging.

## Evidence

Build log error:
```
Failed to compile.

./app/w/agents/page.tsx:27:17
Type error: Property trim does not exist on type number.

  25 |
  26 |   const filtered = useMemo(() => {
> 27 |     if (!search.trim()) return agents
     |                 ^
  28 |     const query = search.toLowerCase()
```

Deployment: 9bea0d73-4372-4680-961a-b96684859ef8
Commit: 62e88369c333090dc60c957750f85e21d2ba3bf3

## Recommended Fix

Change line 18 from:
```tsx
const [search, setSearch] = useState(123)
```

To:
```tsx
const [search, setSearch] = useState("")
```

## Impact

Production deployment is blocked. The previous deployment is also failed, so web.hiveloop.com may be running an older healthy deployment or may be down. Need to verify the last successful deployment status.",
    "labels": ["incident"]
  }' | jq '{number, html_url, title}'

cd /home/daytona/repos/hiveloop && gh issue create \
  --title "[Incident] web.hiveloop.com: TypeScript build failure - search state initialized as number" \
  --body "$(cat <<'ISSUE_EOF'
## Summary

**Service:** web.hiveloop.com
**Environment:** production
**Status:** FAILED
**Detected:** 2026-04-16T16:58:37Z

## Root Cause

TypeScript error in `apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx` at line 18: the `search` state variable is initialized as a number (`123`) instead of a string, but the code at line 27 calls `.trim()` on it, which is a string method.

**File:** `apps/web/app/w/agents/page.tsx`
**Lines:** 18, 27

```tsx
// Line 18 - incorrect initialization
const [search, setSearch] = useState(123)

// Line 27 - calls .trim() on number, causing TypeScript error
if (!search.trim()) return agents
```

The commit message from the previous failed deployment (6dd0957a) mentioned: "Also includes intentional type error in agents page to trigger dispatch webhook." This error appears to be a leftover from that testing and was not removed before merging.

## Evidence

Build log error:
```
Failed to compile.

./app/w/agents/page.tsx:27:17
Type error: Property 'trim' does not exist on type 'number'.

  25 |
  26 |   const filtered = useMemo(() => {
> 27 |     if (!search.trim()) return agents
     |                 ^
  28 |     const query = search.toLowerCase()
```

Deployment: `9bea0d73-4372-4680-961a-b96684859ef8`
Commit: `62e88369c333090dc60c957750f85e21d2ba3bf3`

## Recommended Fix

Change line 18 from:
```tsx
const [search, setSearch] = useState(123)
```

To:
```tsx
const [search, setSearch] = useState("")
```

## Impact

Production deployment is blocked. The previous deployment is also failed, so web.hiveloop.com may be running an older healthy deployment or may be down. Need to verify the last successful deployment status.
ISSUE_EOF
)" \
  --label "incident"
